---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability for the viewer, schema, skill or other.
title: ''
labels: ''
assignees: IdraDev

---

## Use case

What real diagram / workflow can't you express today?

## Proposed change

One paragraph. What would the user see / do differently?

## Schema impact

- [ ] No schema change
- [ ] Adds optional field(s) — list:
- [ ] Adds enum value(s) — list:
- [ ] New map `type` (requires layout, example, icon, skill update)
- [ ] Breaking change (requires RFC + major bump)

## Why now

What's blocked without it. Skip if "would be nice".

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you ruled out and why.

> **Note:** persistent storage / cloud sync / accounts are already on the roadmap — see the README before opening an issue for them.
